scripts.start: (docker start personalfinance-db || docker compose up -d db) && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "api,ui,ai" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta" "cd apps/api && dotnet run --project src/PersonalFinance.Api" "cd apps/frontend && npm run dev" "powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command \"cd services/ai-service; .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000\""
scripts.start:no-api: (docker start personalfinance-db || docker compose up -d db) && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "ui,ai" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd apps/frontend && npm run dev" "powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command \"cd services/ai-service; .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000\""
